growth_records.notes: Only a measured PRODUCT TITER is reported (CHOSs 6.2 g/L for light-controlled strain; 2.5 g/L for the non-light-control control strain in the same 5 L fed-batch bioreactor). No biomass (gDW/DCW), no specific growth rate, and no substrate uptake rate are reported, so NO mmol/gDW/h uptake or secretion rate can be derived (never invented). Bioreactor run duration not explicitly stated in text, so no volumetric productivity computed. Product (CHOSs) is a non-standard engineered oligosaccharide, not a canonical BiGG exchange metabolite. Conditions from Methods 'Fed-batch culture in 5L bioreactor': 30C, pH 7.0 (29% NH3 for control), 0.8 Nm3/h air, initial OD600 1.6, blue light 2.5 mW/cm2 after 8 h.

growth_records.snippet: The CHOSs titer of the recombinant strain CGCH3-CHOS-zwf/pfk/murAAi-R reached 1288.4 mg/L, while that of CGCH3-CHOS-zwf/pfk/murAAi was 542.7 mg/L and that of CGCH3-GNA1-yqaB-nodC was 251.8 mg/L. ... After 75 h, the titers of CHOSs and CSA i
